title: Iran Fars: Trump's demands 'mixture of truth and falsehood' — contradicts MoU text on tolls, nuclear materials, frozen assets ($12B)
snippet: Fars reported Trump's demands 'raised issues that contradict the provisions of the agreement's text.' Key disputes: (1) no toll-free clause in MoU text despite Trump's claim, (2) no nuclear dismantlement reference in draft, (3) Iran insists 'most important part' is $12B frozen assets immediate payment — will refuse further negotiations without it. Trump's assertions characterized as 'manufactured victory'.
tag_reason: 신규 — 이란 국영 Fars의 공식 MoU 반박은 양측 해석 차이를 처음으로 구체적으로 드러낸 새로운 발전
